title: T3 Ingestion: Spec-writing cluster (157) — L2a validation + distillation refresh
prompt: Validate the spec-writing cluster's distillation so it can leave 'provisional' status. The candidate title said 'Distill: spec-writing' but the distillation already exists (6 draft files in research/distillations/spec-writing-*.md, created 2026-05-17, provisional per the living-system spec because only 3 of ~39 source artifacts have Level-2a triage evals). Your job: write L2a triage evals (scored reads, NOT skill runs) into research/evaluations/ for the 5 unevaled sub-cluster winners (spec-kit constitution, ce-doc-review, ce-strategy, bmad-prd, and David's ARCHIVED spec-writer) plus mandatory folds, hard-capped at 18 new evals; then re-validate each of the 6 distillation files against that evidence and David's CURRENT stack (pre-verified drift: spec-writer archived, osmani agent-skills plugin now installed), appending an '## L2a validation' section and upgrading frontmatter status draft -> l2a-validated or l2a-contested; correct the Spec-Writing section of research/distillations/INDEX.md; and write backlog/wargames/proof/T3-08/REPORT.md with an ingestion shortlist plus a T2/BA-agent handoff (which spec-writing mechanisms the BA-agent pipeline should compose). NO canonical/ writes — ingestion is a follow-on wave. Never write to research/artifacts/, census.jsonl, recon/, appydave-plugins, or upstream repos. The spec-writer resurrect-vs-replace call is David's — mark that sub-cluster contested, don't decide it. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T3-08-distill-spec-writing.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: research/evaluations/ contains new hyphen-named eval files including spec-kit-command-constitution.md, compound-engineering-skill-ce-doc-review.md, compound-engineering-skill-ce-strategy.md, bmad-method-skill-bmad-prd.md, and appydave-plugins-skill-spec-writer.md, each with frontmatter (artifact_id, evaluated_at, source_version) and the six-field Scores block; total eval count >= 93 and no pre-existing eval deleted. All 6 research/distillations/spec-writing-*.md files have no 'status: draft' remaining (each l2a-validated or l2a-contested, never 'validated'/'ratified'), an '## L2a validation' section, and an l2a_coverage frontmatter field. research/distillations/INDEX.md Spec-Writing section carries an L2a validation line and corrected file counts (5 -> 6). backlog/wargames/proof/T3-08/REPORT.md exists with coverage, per-sub-cluster verdicts, findings, ingestion shortlist, T2/BA-agent handoff, and consolidated David questions. A commit mentioning wg-t3-08 exists. Negative: git status shows research/artifacts/, research/census.jsonl, research/recon/ untouched; no changes under canonical/; git -C ~/dev/ad/appydave-plugins diff --quiet passes; upstream repos untouched.
